mapper.select: SELECT id, campaign_id, recipient_id, status, payload, retry_count, fail_reason, next_retry_at, reserved_at, sent_at, failed_at, dead_at, created_at, updated_at FROM notification_request WHERE status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY created_at ASC, id ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id, campaign_id, recipient_id, status, payload, retry_count, fail_reason, next_retry_at, reserved_at, sent_at, failed_at, dead_at, created_at, updated_at FROM notification_request WHERE status = 'FAILED' AND retry_count < #{maxRetryCount} AND next_retry_at <= NOW() ORDER BY next_retry_at ASC, id ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id, campaign_id, recipient_id, status, payload, retry_count, fail_reason, next_retry_at, reserved_at, sent_at, failed_at, dead_at, created_at, updated_at FROM notification_request WHERE status = 'PENDING' OR ( status = 'FAILED' AND retry_count < #{maxRetryCount} AND next_retry_at <= NOW() ) ORDER BY CASE WHEN status = 'FAILED' THEN 0 WHEN status = 'PENDING' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, COALESCE(next_retry_at, created_at) ASC, id ASC LIMIT #{limit}

WITH picked AS ( SELECT id FROM notification_request WHERE status = 'PENDING' OR ( status = 'FAILED' AND retry_count < #{maxRetryCount} AND next_retry_at <= NOW() ) ORDER BY CASE WHEN status = 'FAILED' THEN 0 WHEN status = 'PENDING' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, COALESCE(next_retry_at, created_at) ASC, id ASC LIMIT #{limit} FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED ) UPDATE notification_request AS nr SET status = 'RESERVED', reserved_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() FROM picked WHERE nr.id = picked.id RETURNING nr.id, nr.campaign_id, nr.recipient_id, nr.status, nr.payload, nr.retry_count, nr.fail_reason, nr.next_retry_at, nr.reserved_at, nr.sent_at, nr.failed_at, nr.dead_at, nr.created_at, nr.updated_at

SELECT id, campaign_id, recipient_id, status, payload, retry_count, fail_reason, next_retry_at, reserved_at, sent_at, failed_at, dead_at, created_at, updated_at FROM notification_request WHERE status = 'RESERVED' AND reserved_at < NOW() - (#{timeoutMinutes} * INTERVAL '1 minute') ORDER BY reserved_at ASC, id ASC
SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS count FROM notification_request GROUP BY status ORDER BY status
